---
title: "Rust API"
---

The Rust API reference is generated by `rustdoc`, separately from the Python API pages generated by `quartodoc`.

The crate-level Rust API is also published on [docs.rs/reducers](https://docs.rs/reducers).


For local tests, `make docs-build` to build local docs and try `rustdoc/reducers/index.html` (or Rust-only case, `make docs-rust` and check `target/doc/reducers/index.html`).
